opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: He woke up making this terrible, harsh barking sound, and he squeaks every time he tries to breathe in when he cries.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My toddler has a barking cough and noisy breathing that's worse tonight and I'm scared about his breathing.

symptom_narrative.onset: 2 days of cold, then barking cough and noisy breathing in last 6h, worse tonight
symptom_narrative.character: seal-like barking cough, hoarse cry, noisy breathing in (stridor)
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: scary noisy breathing when he cries
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse at night and when upset
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: low-grade fever; stridor only when crying, none at rest; NO drooling, can swallow saliva, no leaning-forward posture, calm and consolable at rest, no blue lips

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with family; both parents present and very anxious; recent viral cold

objective_data_offered.value: harsh barking cough and noisy breathing IN only when crying; quiet and settled at rest; mild rib retractions only when crying, resolve at rest; visible on video
swallowing his saliva, not drooling, no leaning-forward posture
lips normal colour, alert and consolable
